mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.sort AS "sort", a.title AS "title", a.info AS "info", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_tixian_title( id, sort, title, info, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{sort}, #{title}, #{info}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
